hooks.prompt: A task was just completed. Check if it was an implementation task (code was written/modified). If yes, output: {"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"TaskCompleted","additionalContext":"MANDATORY: Run dynos-audit:audit-router now before proceeding to the next task or declaring work complete. Do NOT skip this."}}. If it was a non-code task (planning, research, questions), output nothing.
